entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 under the Bingbon name, rebranded to BingX in November 2021, and currently offering spot, derivatives, and copy-trading services.
entity.notes: BingX presents itself as a global exchange. Independent exchange profiles and public legal-entity records identify British Virgin Islands registration, while the group operates through multiple regional entities. The existing predecessor relationship preserves the former Bingbon entity.

events.title: Exchange founded under the Bingbon name
events.description: The exchange that later became BingX was founded in 2018 and developed spot, derivatives, and copy-trading services for a global user base.
events.notes: Only the year is consistently stated in the reviewed sources, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: Bingbon rebranded to BingX
events.description: Bingbon announced and completed its transition to the BingX brand, including a new name and visual identity.
events.notes: The former Bingbon identity is retained separately in HEI and linked through predecessor_id.

evidence.title: About BingX
evidence.notes: Official company overview states that BingX was founded in 2018 and describes its current exchange products.

evidence.title: November 18, 2021 — Bingbon rebranding
evidence.notes: Official notice announcing the new BingX logo and brand name on November 18, 2021.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange profile for BingX
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the 2018 establishment year and identifies British Virgin Islands registration.
